title: Hub Skill Manifest
description: Per-entry manifest for a HubSkill — points at a tar.gz bundle containing SKILL.md (Agent Skills standard) + references/ + optional scripts/. SKILL.md frontmatter parsed at consumer-install time.

description.description: Human-readable summary mirrored from SKILL.md frontmatter description for index display. The authoritative content lives in the bundle's SKILL.md.

dependencies.description: Informational cross-entry references (other skills / mcp-servers this skill works best with).

license.description: SPDX license identifier. Required for hub publish (publisher validator rejects missing/non-permissive).
